fixture.title: Kaifuu RPG Maker MV/MZ Profile B Encrypted-Asset Intake
fixture.summary: Read-only metadata intake from the supplied commercial RPG Maker MV encrypted title (DLsite RJ390522). System.json declares hasEncryptedImages/hasEncryptedAudio with an encryptionKey; image (.rpgmvp) and audio (.rpgmvo) assets carry the RPGMV media header. This repository stores hashes, byte counts, and the key's one-way commitment only; it holds no encrypted or decrypted game bytes and no key material.

license.evidence: Commercial proprietary doujin release used solely as read-only ground truth. This metadata-only intake copies neither game bytes nor license text; only SHA-256 hashes, byte counts, and the key's SHA-256 commitment are recorded.

provenance.creationMethod: A deterministic scan of the supplied read-only game www tree reads each declared encrypted asset, derives the 16-byte key from www/data/System.json encryptionKey, decrypts via the RPGMV asset-XOR scheme, and emits only encrypted/decrypted SHA-256 hashes, byte counts, media magic, and the key commitment.
